failures.description: The agent fabricated the count and record reference instead of using the ProductCatalogSearch result, which showed 4 matching items.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify available Skateboards with deck material=bamboo costing more than $194.56. The tool call at index 3 succeeded and returned exactly 4 matching items with concrete item_ids and prices. At index 4, the Executor produced an answer claiming there are 11 options and citing record 0000000000. Those values are absent from the tool result and all prior context, and the Executor relied on them as the final answer.
